raw_text:
The PPLI Fellowship Program is open to nationals of eligible ASEAN nations: Cambodia, China, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Thailand, and Viet Nam. The PPLI will deliver specialized in-person and remote training to Fellows to strengthen working knowledge and skills in the following key areas:
- Live animal trade chains – source to markets/consumers
- Field Biorisk Management: Biosafety and Biosecurity
- Bio-surveillance
- Risk Assessment, Risk Mitigation and Risk Modelings
- Outbreak Detection and Response
Application Deadline: July 31, 2024
Apply here
rationale: Pandemic Prevention Leadership Initiative fellowship for ASEAN
